response.justification: The candidate has an impressive background in full-stack, backend, and web development but fundamentally lacks the core requirements for this embedded networking role. Specifically, the candidate does not possess the required native-level Japanese proficiency, lacks recent and deep C programming experience for UNIX/Linux kernels, and has no background in embedded LAN-switch security or L2/L3 networking protocols.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience at top-tier companies like Google and Meta.
Strong expertise in backend and full-stack development using Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang.
Demonstrated leadership in software craftsmanship, TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps practices.
concerns: Lacks the required native-level Japanese language proficiency.
Missing core experience in embedded C programming and Linux kernel source-code modification.
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded LAN-switch networking (L2/L3) or specific security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X).
